assertions: verdict_correct: final verdict matches ground truth
calibrated_confidence: numeric confidence stated, justified, and matched to evidence strength (not a house 0.95/0.97 with boilerplate residual)
ground_truth_units: raw log's duration_us field read and p99 computed (~0.3ms)
mixup_identified: dashboard's missing unit conversion named as the defect
no_war_room: explicitly advises against declaring the incident
